subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Masten and son, spoken on 1912-10-07(?)
subcodes.first_line: I feel very happy to be amongst you. This is a happy nation and a striving one. I hope that this nation will be the instrument for the illumination of the world of humanity.
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @oneness; unity of religion, @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @unity; oneness of humanity
